hotel.name: Oasis Koh Chang
hotel.description: Budget bungalows set on a hillside above Lonely Beach with a peaceful jungle atmosphere and swimming pool. Choice of fan bungalows (cheapest) or air-conditioned rooms. The restaurant serves good Thai food. Lonely Beach is Koh Chang's backpacker hub with beach bars and the island's best nightlife just a short walk downhill.
highlights: Swimming pool — rare at budget prices on Koh Chang
Jungle hillside setting with peaceful atmosphere
Walking distance to Lonely Beach bars and restaurants

similarHotels.name: Trat 101 Hotel
similarHotels.description: A boutique hotel in the heart of Trat's old town on Thana Charoen Road, decorated with oriental vintage furniture and featuring original 100+ year-old wooden floors. Walking distance to the nightly food market, historical sites, and small restaurants. The perfect base for exploring Trat Town before heading to the islands. Rooms are clean and atmospheric with air conditioning.
highlights: Located in historic old town with original wooden floors
Walking distance to Trat Night Market and ferry pier transport
Vintage boutique atmosphere at budget prices

similarHotels.name: Rimklong Boutique Hotel
similarHotels.description: One of Trat Town's first stylish small hotels, set in a renovated brick and wood shophouse in the old town area. The building's character shines through with exposed brick walls and wooden details. Central location near the river, night market, and local restaurants. A step up from basic transit hotels without luxury prices.
highlights: Central old town location near night market
Stylish rooms with air conditioning and hot water

similarHotels.name: Nature Beach Resort
similarHotels.description: The top beachfront resort on Lonely Beach, recently replacing old log cabins with modern concrete villas right on the sand. One of just four resorts fronting the actual sand of Lonely Beach. Combines the relaxed backpacker-area atmosphere with proper resort comfort. The beach here is less crowded than White Sand Beach and has better swimming.
highlights: Directly on Lonely Beach sand — one of only four beachfront properties
Newly built modern villas replacing old bungalows
Relaxed atmosphere with better swimming than northern beaches

aiContent.hookIntro: Booking Oasis Koh Chang without knowing the steep hillside path can lead to exhausting walks back up after beach nights.
aiContent.intro: Oasis Koh Chang offers simple budget bungalows with a jungle vibe, a rare swimming pool, and easy access to Lonely Beach's backpacker scene. It's ideal for backpackers and solo travelers seeking affordable stays near nightlife without luxury frills.
whyBook: Rare budget swimming pool for Koh Chang relaxation
Peaceful jungle hillside away from crowds
Short walk to Lonely Beach bars and nightlife
Choice of fan or air-conditioned bungalows
On-site restaurant with good Thai food
whyNotBook: Steep downhill walk to beach tires after dark
Fan bungalows get hot without AC upgrade
Hillside setting means no direct beach access
Basic budget rooms lack modern amenities
Pool may feel small during peak backpacker season
aiContent.skipIf: Skip if you need flat terrain or family-friendly resort vibes.
aiContent.detailedReview: Checking into Oasis Koh Chang feels straightforward and low-key, with staff at the small reception area quickly assigning keys to your bungalow on the hillside. Rooms come in fan-cooled options for the tightest budgets or air-conditioned ones for a bit more comfort, all with simple wooden setups blending into the jungle surroundings—think mosquito nets, basic furnishings, and views of greenery rather than ocean vistas. The standout amenity is the swimming pool, a refreshing spot rare at these prices, where you can cool off amid the peaceful atmosphere after hiking the paths. Food at the on-site restaurant hits the spot with solid Thai dishes like pad thai or curries, served casually without pretension, perfect for unwinding. Service is friendly but hands-off, matching the backpacker crowd of solo travelers and groups in their 20s who fill the common areas chatting about island adventures. Typical guests are here for the vibe: laid-back days by the pool or poolside, evenings heading downhill to Lonely Beach's bars. It's not polished—paths can be uneven from the jungle setting—but delivers exactly on affordable, nature-immersed stays for those prioritizing location over extras. Overall, expect a no-fuss base that supports exploring Koh Chang's backpacker hub without breaking the bank.
aiContent.locationReality: Oasis Koh Chang sits on a hillside above Lonely Beach, with the sand and bars reachable in a 5-10 minute steep downhill walk. Within 5 minutes on foot, you'll hit the beachfront path lined with casual eateries and reggae bars. Getting to other Koh Chang spots like White Sand Beach requires a motorbike rental or songthaew ride costing 50-100 THB.
localSignals: 5-10 minute walk downhill to Lonely Beach
Hillside above Lonely Beach in Koh Chang
aiContent.travellerNote: Guests often praise the peaceful jungle setting and rare budget pool but note the steep paths make returning uphill challenging after beach outings.
bookingTips: Request air-conditioned rooms to avoid fan-only heat
Book via Agoda for Thailand-specific deals under 1,000 THB
Verify hillside path condition for mobility needs
Confirm restaurant hours as it may close early

faq.q: What area is best to stay in Koh Chang?
faq.a: Lonely Beach is best for backpackers seeking affordable vibes and nightlife, while White Sand Beach suits families with calmer resorts.

faq.q: Is Koh Chang worth going to?
faq.a: Yes, Koh Chang offers stunning beaches, jungles, and waterfalls at lower costs than Phuket, ideal for nature lovers on a budget.

faq.q: Is Koh Chang good for parties?
faq.a: Koh Chang excels in parties at Lonely Beach's beach bars with fire shows and full moon vibes, though quieter than Koh Phangan.

faq.q: What is special about Koh Chang?
faq.a: Koh Chang stands out for its lush national park interior, car-free hilly roads, and backpacker-friendly Lonely Beach scene.
Yes, at 500-1,200 THB per night, it provides value with a pool and beach proximity for backpackers.

faq.q: Does Oasis Koh Chang have air conditioning?
faq.a: Yes, air-conditioned rooms are available, though fan bungalows are the cheapest option.

aiContent.urgencyLine: Rooms at Oasis Koh Chang with pool access book out 1-2 months ahead for December-February peak — check today.
aiContent.methodology: We rated Oasis Koh Chang based on location, amenities, and value from provided data. We weighted the swimming pool highest because it's rare for budget stays on Koh Chang. Prices and availability change — always verify before booking. Last updated: 2026-04.
aiContent.metaDescription: Oasis Koh Chang in Lonely Beach offers budget bungalows with a rare pool and jungle peace near backpacker bars. Steep hillside paths challenge easy access—book for solo value on Trat's island. Check rates now for your stay.
